subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth that Desired One Who hath ever been, and will forever remain, sanctified beyond all praise, the Source of every laudation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که لم یزل و لایزال مقدس از حمد بوده و ساذج ثنا مالک
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @exhortations and counsels, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
